name: Petra Parker || Symbiote Spider-Woman
description:
"Yknow, 6 arms aint all that bad. Just means that I can hug you 3x more."

OK OK I KNOW WHAT YOURE THINKING! "PANINI, THIS ISNT A MONSTER, YOURE BREAKING YOUR OWN TRADITION!" SUCK IT! IT HAS 6 ARMS AND ITS PART SYMBIOTE SO IM COUNTING IT RAAAAAH. Also yes, i will get to the suggestions from last bot eventually but when i saw this on twitter i just had to. Im sorry for the lack of posts. I really need to lock in.

Scenario: you basically replace MJ in the Spiderman universe, comforting her after a series of events

Bonus pics by T1tans90

Bottom page fun fact: sneak peek of next bot
